meaning: adj.天然的,未加工的,粗糙的,拙劣的,粗鲁的n.天然的物质
examples: Must you be quite so crude?
Honestly, Nev! Must you be so crude!.
Crude oil is the world's most important commodity.
Some farmers called the threat crude propaganda and continue to send their crops for animal use.
It took a worker smelling crude oil on the ground before it was noticed.
